summary: Completed comprehensive testing of X67 Digital Media Groupe marketplace. Backend APIs working well, frontend has critical JavaScript errors in category pages.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 521 'Payment service unavailable' instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests
flaky_endpoints.impact: Viva Wallet integration may have configuration issues

ui_bugs.issue: JavaScript runtime errors: 'Select.Item must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
Admin login fails with 'Invalid credentials' - password may be incorrect

integration_issues.issue: Category pages fail to load due to Select component errors

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with banner carousel and categories grid
Categories API returns all 8 categories with subcategories
Cities API returns 41 Romanian cities with proper structure
Car brands API returns 20 brands with models
Auth page renders with login/register forms and Google button
Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users (admin panel redirects to homepage)

success_percentage.backend: 80% (21/26 tests passed - some 'failures' are expected behavior)
success_percentage.frontend: 60% (homepage works, auth page works, category pages broken)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Select component errors in CategoryPage.jsx - components are missing required value props. Also verify admin password (current 'admin' password fails login). Category pages are completely broken due to JavaScript errors.
